scenario.name: fixed-input backtest
scenario.reason: The repository appears to expose a user-facing workflow that evaluates a strategy over historical prices.

primary_metric.name: elapsed_sec
primary_metric.reason: Users benefit when the same backtest completes faster for the same input and behavior.

correctness.reason: Optimizations must preserve the resulting trades and portfolio summary for the benchmark input.

known_weaknesses: The sample data may not cover all real market regimes.
next_improvements: Add a second larger input if the repository contains one.
